creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tcberner
Date: Sat May 16 18:33:55 UTC 2020
New revision: 535493
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/535493

Log:
  textproc/zxing-cpp: switch upstream and update to 1.0.8

  Most Linux Distros seem to ship [1] from the nu-book upstream [2].
  For net/kaidan 0.50 this upstram is required.

  Give maintainership to kde@.

  [1] https://repology.org/project/zxing-cpp-nu-book/versions
  [2] https://github.com/nu-book/zxing-cpp

  PR:		246508
  Approved by:	yuri (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/net/kitinerary/Makefile
  head/textproc/zxing-cpp/Makefile
  head/textproc/zxing-cpp/distinfo
  head/textproc/zxing-cpp/files/
  head/textproc/zxing-cpp/pkg-plist
